description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the elixir:1.6 Docker image and runs a global before_script of make init for all jobs, defining the stages Pre-Checks, setup, compile, test, build, publish, and deploy. Add a Code Style job in the Pre-Checks stage that executes make format-check. Add a get-dependencies job in the setup stage that runs make deps and stores the deps directory and mix.lock as artifacts for 30 minutes. Add compile-for-production and compile-for-test jobs in the compile stage that depend on get-dependencies, set MIX_ENV to prod or test respectively, run make compile, and keep all untracked files as artifacts for 30 minutes. Add a tests job in the test stage that depends on get-dependencies and compile-for-test, sets MIX_ENV to test, uses elasticsearch:5, spotify/kafka:latest, and mongo:3.4 services, creates /run/secrets/space-service, loads environment variables from .env, sets SPACE_SERVICE_KAFKA_HOSTS="spotify__kafka:9092", runs make test, captures coverage with the regex /\[TOTAL\]\s+(\d+\.\d+)%/, and retains untracked artifacts for 30 minutes.
